apps.name: backtimer
apps.promise: Merges several recipes' active/passive time into one backward-planned countdown to a single serve time.
apps.target_user: Hosts cooking multi-dish meals who need everything to land together.
apps.one_sentence_promise: Merges several recipes' active/passive time into one backward-planned countdown to a single serve time.

apps.name: cleanline
apps.promise: Photographs a hand-drawn sketch and traces it to clean, editable vector paths (SVG/PDF) via on-device Vision.
apps.target_user: Illustrators/print-on-demand sellers who sketch on paper but need vector output.
apps.one_sentence_promise: Photographs a hand-drawn sketch and traces it to clean, editable vector paths (SVG/PDF) via on-device Vision.

apps.name: crockwatch
apps.promise: Adaptive fermentation batch tracker with taste-check timers tuned to variable, temp-dependent process time, not a fixed clock.
apps.target_user: Home fermentation hobbyists running multiple concurrent ferments.
apps.one_sentence_promise: Adaptive fermentation batch tracker with taste-check timers tuned to variable, temp-dependent process time, not a fixed clock.

apps.name: docket
apps.promise: Turns dense local-government agendas/minutes into a plain-language, on-device digest of what changed.
apps.target_user: Civically engaged residents with no time to read 80-page PDFs.
apps.one_sentence_promise: Turns dense local-government agendas/minutes into a plain-language, on-device digest of what changed.

apps.name: tessella
apps.promise: Parametric seamless-pattern designer with a live tiled preview, guaranteed seamless by construction.
apps.target_user: Independent textile/surface designers needing print-ready repeats.
apps.one_sentence_promise: Parametric seamless-pattern designer with a live tiled preview, guaranteed seamless by construction.

apps.name: throughline
apps.promise: Builds a private, evolving timeline explainer for one ongoing story from articles you feed it via Share Sheet.
apps.target_user: Readers following a specific saga who keep losing the thread.
apps.one_sentence_promise: Builds a private, evolving timeline explainer for one ongoing story from articles you feed it via Share Sheet.
